_note: Token values confirmed from Figma MCP extraction (node 5009:2266). Avatar is a display-only component with no interactive state tokens.

borderRadius.description: Avatar is always fully circular. Applied to both the container and image.

XS.description: Extra small. For inline or dense UI contexts.

SM.description: Small. For compact list rows, chat items, or secondary contexts.

MD.description: Medium. For list rows and compact cards.

LG.description: Large. For trip summaries, ratings, and secondary cards.

XL.description: Extra large. For driver/user cards and prominent secondary displays.

XXL.description: Double extra large. For large driver/user cards.

Largest.description: Largest. For primary profile displays and featured user headers.

background.value: TODO: Confirm design token for placeholder background color.
background.description: Background fill shown behind the silhouette icon when no photo is available.

icon.value: TODO: Confirm icon token or asset for the silhouette placeholder.
icon.description: Silhouette/person icon displayed when no user photo is provided.

objectFit.description: Photo fills the circular container without letterboxing.
